channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US attacks military sites on Iran’s Kharg Island, home to vast oil facility
item.description: Tehran threatens to reduce US-linked oil facilities to 'pile of ashes' if oil structures on the island are targeted.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 15 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: US hits Iran’s Kharg island as it warns oil sites may be next if Tehran disrupts shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Yemeni ports face shipping fee hike amid Iran conflict
item.description: Yemen’s government rejects new shipping surcharges, as fears grow of humanitarian crisis.

item.title: Trump posts bombing video after saying US hit Kharg Island
item.description: Donald Trump shared footage of US air strikes on Iran's Kharg Island.

item.title: Trump claims US ‘way ahead of schedule’ in Iran war
item.description: US President Donald Trump said the United States is “way ahead of schedule” in its war with Iran.

item.title: Projectile falls, explodes in Israel’s Negev
item.description: Video from the Negev in southern Israel captured the moment a projectile following an Iranian missile attack.

item.title: Experts doubt Hegseth claim no need to ‘worry about’ Hormuz
item.description: Experts doubt Pete Hegseth’s claims that the US is working effectively to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Analysts say US threat of ‘no quarter’ for Iran violates international law
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said there would be 'no quarter, no mercy' as US continues to pummel Iran.

item.title: Iran war live: US bombs Iran’s Kharg Island, warns oil facilities next
item.description: Intense strikes target central Tehran as US president says 'powerful' bombing raid hit Iranian forces on Kharg Island.

item.title: Drone attack on market in Sudan kills 11, as air war civilian toll mounts
item.description: More than 200 civilians killed in recent days as drone strikes tear through markets, schools and hospitals.
